clark.name: Clark
clark.tagline: Your AI memory coach — tracks progress, identifies weak spots, and assigns targeted practice
clark.description: Clark is Gridually's AI memory coach. It analyzes your study patterns, identifies what you're struggling with, and creates personalized practice sessions. Think of it as a private tutor that knows exactly what you need to review and when.

individual.title: Clark for Individual Learners

features.name: Progress Tracking
features.description: Clark tracks every study session — what you got right, what you struggled with, how long you studied, and how your retention is improving over time.

features.name: Weak Spot Detection
features.description: Clark identifies the specific cards and topics where you consistently struggle, then automatically schedules extra practice for those areas.

features.name: Targeted Practice Sessions
features.description: Instead of reviewing everything equally, Clark creates focused sessions that prioritize your weakest areas while maintaining your strong ones.

features.name: Progress Reports
features.description: Weekly and monthly reports showing your learning trajectory, retention rates, and areas of improvement. See exactly how many cards you've mastered.

features.name: Study Recommendations
features.description: Clark suggests when to study, how long to study, and what to focus on based on your performance patterns and upcoming goals (e.g., an exam date).

individual.how_it_works: Clark uses your SRQ (Spatial Recall Quality) scores combined with study frequency and error patterns to build a model of your knowledge. It then optimizes your review schedule to maximize retention while minimizing study time.

teacher.title: Clark for Teachers — via Tutually
teacher.tagline: Classroom learning intelligence powered by Clark
teacher.description: Tutually brings Clark's AI coaching to the classroom. Teachers get a dashboard showing how every student is performing, what topics the class struggles with, and automated homework assignments based on individual student needs.

features.name: Class Dashboard
features.description: See at a glance how your entire class is performing. Which students are on track, which need help, and which topics are causing the most difficulty.

features.name: Individual Student Insights
features.description: Drill into any student's performance. See their learning patterns, weak spots, and progress over time — without looking at every single session.

features.name: Automated Homework Assignment
features.description: Clark generates personalized homework for each student based on their individual weak spots. No more one-size-fits-all assignments.

features.name: Topic Mastery Tracking
features.description: Track which curriculum topics your class has mastered and which need more attention. Plan your teaching around real data, not assumptions.

features.name: Parent Reports
features.description: Generate progress reports for parents showing concrete learning metrics — what their child has mastered, what they're working on, and how they compare to learning goals.

school.title: Clark for Schools — Tutually Institution
school.description: Tutually for institutions provides school-wide learning analytics, curriculum alignment tools, and multi-teacher administration. Deploy spatial memory learning across entire departments or schools.

features.name: School-wide Analytics
features.description: See learning outcomes across all classes, teachers, and subjects. Identify where the curriculum is working and where it's not.

features.name: Curriculum Alignment
features.description: Map Gridually decks to your school's curriculum standards. Ensure every study deck covers the required material.

features.name: Multi-teacher Admin
features.description: Department heads and administrators can oversee multiple classes and teachers from a single dashboard.

features.name: LMS Integration
features.description: Integrates with existing Learning Management Systems — Google Classroom, Canvas, Moodle, and more.

features.name: Data Privacy & Compliance
features.description: FERPA and GDPR compliant. Student data is encrypted and access is role-controlled.

school.pricing: Contact for institutional pricing — volume discounts available
